metadata.title: Vhetra | Web design and visual identity
metadata.description: Vhetra is a studio focused on web design, visual identity and digital presence. We create clear, strategic and tailored websites for brands, businesses and projects.

philosophy.title: Our Philosophy | Web Design, Visual Identity & Digital Presence
philosophy.intro: We don’t create isolated pieces; we build brands as coherent systems.
philosophy.body1: At Vhetra we integrate technology, design and strategy to transform ideas into living identities. We understand that a brand is not defined by a single element, but by the relationship between all of them: its digital architecture, visual identity and presence in the online world.
philosophy.body2: We develop web design and digital presence for brands, projects and businesses that want to communicate with clarity and coherence. We create fast, accessible websites adapted to every device, combining development with Next.js, React and modern technologies alongside a carefully directed design approach.
philosophy.body3: We do not follow passing trends; we design structures with identity, built to function and endure.
philosophy.body4: We are structure and sensitivity at the same time: code that breathes brand.

services.presenciaDigitalMini: A web page accompanied by a visual identity
services.presenciaDigitalFull:
A web page accompanied by a clear visual identity to start communicating your brand professionally both on the web and on social media. Designed for ventures that need a coherent aesthetic across all their digital channels.

Includes:

  • Landing Page (Simple website to showcase your business and receive inquiries)
  • Existing logo adaptation
  • Typography definition (Fonts your brand will use)
  • Color palette (Colors that will visually represent your brand)
  • Basic visual kit (Graphic elements to maintain aesthetic coherence)
  • Identity adaptation for social media
  • 6 initial Instagram posts (Ready-to-publish designed pieces)


Available with monthly maintenance that may include new posts each month.
services.marcaDigitalFull:
A complete visual system along with a website developed according to your business's specific needs. Ideal for brands that require additional functionalities beyond a basic informational page.

Includes:

  • Custom website development (May include appointments, service catalog, bookings or other functions)
  • Branding (Logo design or redesign and brand visual style)
  • Typography and color definition
  • Social media adaptation
  • 6 initial posts
  • Graphic pieces for digital communication


Available in monthly modality that may include:

  • Website maintenance
  • Content updates
  • Publication management
  • New monthly graphic pieces
services.presenciaEnRedesFull:
A visual and strategic base to start communicating your brand on social media professionally. Ideal for ventures or projects that want to launch their presence on Instagram with a clear identity, coherent content and initial planning that facilitates maintaining activity.

Includes:

  • 30 edited photos (Image optimization for social media, taking care of color, framing and visual style)
  • 9 initial feed posts (Designed according to the brand's visual identity to create an attractive and coherent profile from the start)
  • Content calendar for one month (Planning of ideas and publication topics to maintain ordered and constant communication)
  • Adaptation of existing logo (If necessary, so it works correctly on social media)
services.landingPageFull: A simple single-section web page where your business, services or products and contact methods are displayed.
services.ecommerceMini: Online store to sell your products
services.ecommerceFull:
Development of an online store where your clients can view products, add them to the cart and make purchases.

Includes:

  • Product catalog
  • Shopping cart
  • Payment method integration (e.g. Mercado Pago)
  • Management panel for prices and stock
services.paginasPersonalizadasFull:
Development of websites with specific functions according to your activity.

May include:

  • Appointment system
  • Calendars
  • Service catalog
  • Online bookings
  • Administration panel
services.manejoRedesFull:
Content management for social media including publication design and visual brand adaptation.

Can be contracted as:

  • Initial identity package: Includes typography definition, colors and design of 6 publications
  • Monthly service: Includes design of 6 publications per month. Requires previously defined visual identity.
services.brandingLogotipoFull:
Logo design and visual style for your brand to maintain consistency on web, social media or print material.

Includes:

  • Logo design
  • Typography
  • Brand colors
  • Visual guidelines
services.mantenimientoWebFull: Monthly service that includes technical updates, content changes and general site support. (Varies according to website complexity)
services.hostingDominioMini: Services for your site to be online
services.hostingDominioFull:
Services necessary for your website to be available on the internet.

  • Domain is contracted through NIC Argentina from approximately $8,000 annually
  • Hosting service price varies depending on the provider
  • Both are mandatory for any website to function.
services.automatizacionesFull: Integration of forms, appointment systems, automatic responses or connections with external platforms. (Varies according to the complexity of the required functionality)

tarjeta.description: We design brands and their digital presence. (Web, social media and identity)

contact.whatsappAction: Let's connect and take the first step.

projects.subtitle: Here we share some of the projects that reflect that result.

acrodata.titulo: A digital experience designed to accompany movement.
acrodata.descripcionP1: Includes a card gallery to explore Acroyoga poses and a tool to combine them into your own flows. A classes section, informative booklet and simple direct contact are added, all within a light interface.
acrodata.descripcionP2: Designed part by part, turning structure into aesthetics and functionality into flow.

estacionAlemania.titulo: A digital experience to discover the history and flavors of Estación Alemania.
estacionAlemania.descripcionP1: We developed an online menu designed so visitors can easily explore the gastronomic proposal of the place. The site presents the complete menu in Spanish and English, allowing both tourists and local visitors to access the same information clearly and simply.
estacionAlemania.descripcionP2: In addition to the digital menu, the web includes a brief history of the old railway station and an introduction to the Interpretation Center that operates in the same space, integrating the cultural value of the place with its gastronomic proposal. Direct access to Instagram, contact options and location were also incorporated to facilitate the arrival of visitors to the station.

filiSuites.titulo: A visual identity designed to inhabit the digital space
filiSuites.descripcionP1: At Fili Suites we worked on the design of the visual identity for social media and the content strategy for Instagram, creating a coherent aesthetic inspired by the colors, textures and atmosphere of the space.
filiSuites.descripcionP2: The communication seeks to reflect the tranquility and warmth of the accommodation, building a clear, professional online presence aligned with the experience guests have.

whatsapp.message: Hi! I'm contacting you about the {service} service I saw on your website.

metadata.title: VHETRA - We design brand ecosystems
metadata.description: We design brand ecosystems. Digital experiences that are felt.
